name: io.github.Antmanbuilds/ari-mcp-py
description: Python MCP server for ARI · live fair-market-value lookups, leaderboards, and Ed25519 signed-receipt verification for x402/MPP services. Same tool surface as the Node package, for Python-native agents.

environmentVariables.name: ARI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the ARI API base URL. Defaults to https://agentrateindicators.com/api.
